case_title: ALEXANDER DRILLING, INC., VS. URS OPERATING SERVICES, INC.,

docket_entries.description: ISSUED THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER DRILLING, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER DRILLING, INC.
